message:
feat(cli): add rich terminal output support across major commands

Enhance the CLI experience with rich_rust integration for beautiful
terminal output when running in interactive mode. All commands now
detect output mode (plain vs rich) and render accordingly.

Changes by command:

agents.rs (+373 lines):
- Add rich rendering for --check mode showing agent file detection
- Rich output for --add, --remove, --update operations
- Visual feedback for blurb version status and backups
- Context-aware OutputContext propagation

history.rs (+306 lines):
- Rich table display for issue history with colored status
- Improved diff visualization between historical states
- Better formatting for timestamps and metadata

info.rs (+186 lines):
- Rich panels for project information display
- Visual hierarchy for issue details and statistics
- Improved readability of issue metadata

where.rs (+77 lines):
- Rich output for directory and file location queries
- Visual indicators for path types and existence

The rich output only activates in TTY mode; non-TTY output remains
plain text for scripting compatibility.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
